# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:latest as base

# Web server (Nginx)
RUN apk --no-cache add nginx
COPY nginx/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80

# API Server (nodejs, express)
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN apk add --no-cache nodejs npm && npm install
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

# Database (PostgreSQL)
FROM postgres:13.2-alpine
ENV POSTGRES_PASSWORD your_password
RUN apk add --no-cache libpq
EXPOSE 5432

# Redis
FROM redis:6.0.9-alpine
EXPOSE 6379
